summary: Changed the two aerc INBOX querymap entries in modules/home/email/aerc.nix from tag:inbox AND folder:/Gmail|Logos/ to the bare exact-match form INBOX=folder:Gmail / INBOX=folder:Logos, added a documenting comment recording why Unread/Flagged/Proposed-* deliberately stay account-wide, and verified with a successful home-manager build.

artifacts.summary: Fixed INBOX querymap entries for gmail and logos accounts; added scope-decision comment

completion_data.completion_summary: Fixed the aerc INBOX virtual folder to reflect true maildir-folder membership (folder:Gmail / folder:Logos) instead of the permanent tag:inbox marker combined with an over-matching account regex, with rationale documented inline and home-manager build verified.

next_steps: Activate with home-manager switch --flake .#benjamin to apply; INBOX tab should then show ~tens of messages instead of ~12k. Archived mail leaving the INBOX view depends on task 112.
